Home / Products / Pleated Blinds

Product Details

Pleated Blinds

A compact, elegant pleated system for small, medium, and non-standard windows.

Typical use: Bedroom · Kitchen · Home office

Pleated blinds are ideal when you want a light look, clean lines, and a precise fit. They work well in homes, offices, and commercial spaces where light control, a minimalist aesthetic, and a solution tailored to each window shape matter. Winsome manufactures pleated blinds to custom measurements so every opening gets a properly fitted, practical solution.

Request Consultation Call Winsome

Features

  • Compact folding system
  • Made to fit non-standard and narrow windows
  • Light visual for modern interiors
  • Custom-made to individual sizes

Benefits

  • Does not visually clutter the room
  • Easily manages light and privacy
  • Suits compact spaces well
  • Convenient for everyday use

Questions

Frequently asked questions about this product

Are pleated blinds suitable for small windows? +

Yes. Pleated systems are especially practical for small, narrow, and non-standard windows, including skylights or triangular openings. The compact folding mechanism does not take up extra space and keeps small rooms from feeling heavy. Winsome produces pleated blinds to custom measurements, so even unusual windows can be covered cleanly and functionally.

Can pleated blinds be made to custom measurements? +

Yes. Winsome manufactures every order based on accurate on-site measuring—each window is measured individually rather than using stock sizes. Measuring service is available in Tbilisi and major cities across Georgia. Production begins after measurement and is typically completed within several working days. You receive blinds cut to your exact opening for smooth operation and a neat finish.
